{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = crocodile-creature (The Elder Empire: Shadow)
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Shadow and Sea (novel)|Of Shadow and Sea]]
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|A four-legged creature with a pair of crocodile heads lumbered down the steps.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c21">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
